# AGENTS

Additional instructions for work inside `.github/`.

- Keep `.ai/` as the canonical AI memory store.
- Use `.ai/agents/subagents.md` as the canonical role index and the individual files in `.ai/agents/` as the canonical full role definitions.
- Keep `.github/agents/`, `.github/notes/`, and `.github/plans/` as thin duplicate pointers only.
- Use `.github/copilot-instructions.md` and `.github/instructions/*.instructions.md` for GitHub-recognized custom instructions.
- Use `.github/agents/*.agent.md` for GitHub-recognized custom agent profiles.
- Treat this file as a local helper only, not the primary GitHub-recognized instruction surface.
